title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 31 January 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 31 January 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 31 January 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 01/02/2025
The ship recycling market remained largely inactive across all major destinations this week, with no significant improvements or sharp declines. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-02-01_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-25-January-31-January2025_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-02-01_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-25-January-31-January2025_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
25 January - 31 January 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The ship recycling market remained largely inactive across all major destinations this week, with no significant improvements or sharp declines. In India, the
market remained unchanged from the previous week, with stable prices and no shift in the availability of imported scrap.
